positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a cosmic mountain range against a twilight sky. The mountains should be composed of interlocking geometric shapes, glowing with deep cyan and violet bioluminescence. Interspersed among the peaks are clusters of stylized, glowing constellations and nebulas rendered in soft golds and electric blues. The overall aesthetic should evoke ethereal wonder and deep space, using a limited, high-contrast color palette perfect for screen printing. Clean silhouettes, strong central composition, deep indigo and cosmic glow highlights, vector illustration style, perfect for apparel print.
